name: Task Decomposition & Team Spawning
description: Handles automatic decomposition of complex tasks into subtasks and spawning of parallel agent teams. Parses SUBTASKS and TEAM JSON blocks from agent output, creates child tasks with dependencies, and coordinates phase completion.
